original_statement: how many internally goals did marcos pizzelli score after scoring in saint petersburg, russia?
mutated_statement: how many internally goals did the player score after scoring in that city, country while also counting only goals that occurred prior to that same scoring?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Location de‑specification + Added contradictory temporal filter + Coreference ambiguity: "marcos pizzelli" → "the player" | "saint petersburg, russia" → "that city, country" | added "only goals that occurred prior to that same scoring" which contradicts "after scoring" (marcos pizzelli → the player; saint petersburg, russia → that city, country; after scoring → prior to that same scoring)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处judge_thought（例如每次judge_thought均明确写道“问题条件……互相排斥，正确计数应为0”）和critique（多次指出使用了未授权的simple_query且没有任何推理步骤或函数使用），可以识别出关键事实：(1) 评判者已多次指出指令内部矛盾并给出逻辑结论；(2) 但Agent始终只反复调用unsupported的simple_query、未输出答案、也未提出澄清或修正请求。Agent的具体表现为机械重复无效操作、缺乏语义层面质疑或主动纠正、未尝试迭代修正或询问用户。因而归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”——Agent没有识别并处理语义矛盾，而是在形式化/机械的执行路径上停滞，既未澄清也未合理化矛盾。
